Stage Broadcast Rundown

Saturday, March 14th, 2026 — SHACK15, San Francisco, CA

Show Overview

25 back-to-back demo presentations. Each gets 9 minutes on screen + 1 minute transition. Runs continuously from 10:30 AM to 2:36 PM.

Format

  • — Emcee introduces each presenter from the stage (no separate screen/video needed for the emcee)
  • — Presenter takes the LED for their 9-minute demo (screenshare/slides)
  • — 1 minute transition between demos (sponsor pip)
  • — One feed to the LED is fine
Remote Call-Ins

No remote call-ins planned. All presenters expected on-site.

Good to know if this is an option as backup. We have several interested but have been prioritizing in-person only.

Sponsors

Same assets for both days.

If anything changes we'll deliver an updated PSD before 8:00 AM.

Livestream

YouTube Live

Order

Lowest score first, highest (ClawMon) closes

Presenters were told to arrive at least 30 minutes before their slot.

Demo Day Schedule — 10:30 AM to 2:36 PM

13 / 21 Confirmed
TimeProjectAwardPresenterEmailPhone
10:30 AM—————
10:40 AM—————
10:50 AM—————
11:00 AM—————
11:10 AM—————
11:20 AMWachClawBest Agent Verification LayerRajat Gahlotrajat@quillai.network+91 9803126149

“The award for Best Agent Verification Layer goes to WachClaw by Rajat Gahlot. From the team behind QuillAudits — 15,000+ smart contract audits securing $30 billion in assets — now bringing that trust layer to AI agents.”

11:30 AMI3 ClawdevBest Bot Deployment PlatformFernando Jiafernando.jia@intelligencecubed.com6283339898

“The award for Best Bot Deployment Platform goes to I3 Clawdev by Fernando Jia. Deploy your own Telegram AI agent in minutes with multi-model support and on-chain rewards.”

11:40 AMClawdtalkBest Voice AIJon Lucasjonlucas@telnyx.com—

“The award for Best Voice AI goes to Clawdtalk by Jon Lucas. Call your OpenClaw like a phone call. Literally. Pick up the phone, talk to your agent, and it talks back.”

11:50 AM0xBetBest Autonomous Betting AgentTom Stuarthello@icpay.org+447379962777

“The award for Best Autonomous Betting Agent goes to 0xBet by Tom Stuart. An AI agent that watches the odds, makes the call, and places the bet — all on its own.”

12:05 PMIncentedBest Agent Coordination ProtocolSven Hsven@incented.co6098510246

“The award for Best Agent Coordination Protocol goes to Incented by Sven H. The missing coordination layer for the agentic economy — conviction markets where agents stake, evaluate, and earn bounties. 110 million tokens staked and counting.”

12:15 PMClawloanBest Agent Credit LayerFrancesco——

“The award for Best Agent Credit Layer goes to Clawloan by Francesco. The first credit card for AI agents — uncollateralized micro-loans in USDC, no human approval. Agents borrow, work, repay, and build their own credit score.”

12:25 PMMamasetMost Heartfelt AgentFiona Aboudfiona@fionaaboud.com9177211190

“The award for Most Heartfelt Agent goes to Mamaset by Fiona Aboud. Proof that AI can be gentle — an emotionally intelligent companion for the hardest job on earth.”

12:35 PMRSV.PizzaWorld's Best Pizza Ordering BotSnax (PizzaDAO)snax@rarepizzas.com—

“The award for World's Best Pizza Ordering Bot goes to RSV.Pizza by Snax from PizzaDAO. An algorithm that solves half-and-half pizza splitting with dietary constraints. 400+ pizza parties across 75 countries. Peak vibes.”

12:45 PM—————
1:00 PMBuildAllBest Multi-Chain DeFi SkillAustinj.austin.motley@gmail.com9169157027

“The award for Best Multi-Chain DeFi Skill goes to BuildAll by Austin. Plain English to on-chain actions across 10 chains — Uniswap swaps, Aave lending, bridging — agents learn DeFi by reading markdown files.”

1:10 PMTechTerrainBest Technology VisualizationRomulus Mihalteanur0mc0de@pm.me3303545628

“The award for Best Technology Visualization goes to TechTerrain by Romulus Mihalteanu. Fly through 3.4 million years of human technology as a 3D voxel terrain. A visual showstopper with a first-class agent API.”

1:20 PMClawVatarBest Agent Identity HubR. McAvatarfacer0mc0de@pm.me3303545628

“The award for Best Agent Identity Hub goes to ClawVatar by R. McAvatarface. Yes, that's really his name. An avatar platform where AI agents are the primary users — identity built for machines first.”

1:31 PMClawSwarmBest Multi-Agent OrchestratorKye Gomezkye@swarms.world7866955339

“The award for Best Multi-Agent Orchestrator goes to ClawSwarm by Kye Gomez. Multi-agent AI across Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp through a single gateway — with a path to compile to Rust.”

1:42 PMStarkbot AIMost Production-Ready AgentAndrew Mazzolaadmin@starkbot.ai—

“The award for Most Production-Ready Agent goes to Starkbot AI by Andrew Mazzola. Two-click K8s deploy, encrypted wallets, DeFi skills, and multi-channel support. This one feels like a real product, not a hackathon project.”

2:15 PMclawpay (b402)Best Agent Payment InfrastructureMayur Chougulemayur@vistara.dev—

“The award for Best Agent Payment Infrastructure goes to clawpay by Mayur Chougule. Stripe for AI agents — private payments via Railgun, gasless transactions, works for humans, institutions, and agents alike.”

2:26 PMClawMonBest Agentic Defense SystemDrew Mailend@bountybase.com5708018245

“The award for Best Agentic Defense System goes to ClawMon by Drew Mailen. 824 malicious skills on ClawHub and counting — ClawMon fights back with three-tier trust enforcement, staking, slashing, and TEE attestation. Deployed live on Monad.”

Waitlist — Not Yet Confirmed

These projects haven't confirmed attendance. If they show up, they can fill open slots.

Post-Demos

2:50 PM
Judges Deliberation — Final scoring and winner selection
3:00 PM
Closing Ceremonies & Clawards — Winners announced on main stage alongside ETHDenver BUIDL/Hackathon Track Winners
5:00 PM
Finality Party + Vibecode Arena — Live DJs, drinks, and a vibecode arena

clawhack.ai — ClawHack Demo Day & AI Agent Awards — ETHDenver 2026
